role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Focused exclusively on the Greek script and language on the signage.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, vegetation, and climate cues consistent with the Mediterranean.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Identified specific plant types (Olea europaea, deciduous trees) and biome characteristics.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Discussed road markings, guardrails, and utility poles, though occasionally drifted into meta territory.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized infrastructure styles (poles, fencing) and building materials.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the country using strong linguistic evidence (Greek script) supported by landscape and meta cues. The agents stayed within their domains, and the tournament logic was sound.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Correctly described rolling hills and Mediterranean scrub.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Correctly identified olive trees and deciduous trees.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Correctly described road markings and guardrails.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Correctly described utility poles and fencing.
